scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --workspace @wargames/api" "npm run dev --workspace @wargames/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @wargames/engine && npm run build --workspace @wargames/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @wargames/content && npm run build --workspace @wargames/api && npm run build --workspace @wargames/web
scripts.ci:phase1: npm run validate:content && npm run simulate:balance && npm run test:token-regression && npm run test
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck --workspace @wargames/engine && npm run typecheck --workspace @wargames/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @wargames/web
scripts.quickstart: npm install && npm run generate:images && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && npm run dev
